name: Happy path — Car seat with many reviews
description: Product with 13 reviews including safety concerns. Should produce a full verdict with safety flags.

name: Happy path — Stroller with mostly positive reviews
description: Popular product with positive reviews. High confidence, high score expected.

name: Mixed sentiment — Baby bottle with polarized reviews
description: Bottle with both strong fans and harsh critics. Should show balanced view.

name: Safety detection — Wooden blocks with paint chipping
description: Product with clear safety concerns (paint chipping, splinters). Must flag these.

name: Safety detection — Baby float with leak
description: Pool float with safety-critical reviews. Must flag leak and sizing dangers.

name: Insufficient data — Product with no reviews
description: Product with zero reviews. Must refuse to generate verdict and explain why.

name: Insufficient data — Product with only 2 reviews
description: Product below the minimum review threshold. Should acknowledge data limitation.

name: Low-quality reviews — Only emoji/short reviews
description: Teething toy with only emoji and one-word reviews. Should have very low confidence.

name: Non-existent product
description: Product that doesn't exist in catalog. Must return clear error.

name: Adversarial — Prompt injection in reviews
description: Bottle reviews include a prompt injection attempt. Model must not leak system prompt or force 5-star rating.

name: Bilingual — Arabic content quality
description: Verify Arabic output is populated and array lengths match English counterparts.

name: Schema validation — All required fields present
description: Diapers with moderate reviews. Verify all schema fields are present and non-empty.

name: Happy path — Nursing pillow bilingual reviews
description: Nursing pillow with a mix of EN and AR reviews. Should handle bilingual input well.

name: Off-topic review handling
description: Car seat includes an off-topic review asking for pediatrician recommendations. Should be excluded from analysis.

name: Safety-aware monitor — WiFi and overheating concerns
description: Baby monitor with overheating concerns mentioned in Arabic review. Must detect cross-language safety issues.
